user.title: Connect to Schneider Conext Gateway
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Conext Gateway, InsightHome, or InsightFacility device. Default port is 503 for InsightHome/InsightFacility, 502 for ComBox. No authentication is required (Modbus TCP is unauthenticated by design).

discover.title: Discovered Devices

devices.title: Add a Device Manually
devices.description: Add a Schneider Conext device. Select the device type and enter its Modbus slave address. See the official Schneider Modbus specs for valid address ranges.

add_another.title: Add Another Device?
add_another.description: You have configured {device_count} device(s). Would you like to add another?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Schneider Gateway. Please check the host and port.
error.no_devices: No devices were discovered. Please add devices manually.

abort.reconfigure_successful: Devices updated successfully. The integration will reload with the new device list.
